nasb.text: Hilkiah responded and said to Shaphan the scribe, “I have found the book of the law in the house of the Lord.” And Hilkiah gave the book to Shaphan.

esv.text: Then Hilkiah answered and said to Shaphan the secretary, “I have found the Book of the Law in the house of the Lord.” And Hilkiah gave the book to Shaphan.

cnv.text: 希勒家對書記沙番說：“我在耶和華的殿裡發現了律法書。”希勒家就把書交給沙番。

ccb.text: 希勒迦就对沙番书记说：“我在耶和华的殿里发现了律法书。”希勒迦就把书卷交给沙番。
